creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
diff -ruN m4.old/Makefile m4/Makefile
--- m4.old/Makefile	Tue Dec  5 13:36:17 2006
+++ m4/Makefile	Mon Apr  9 08:45:35 2007
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	m4
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.8
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.9
+PORTREVISION=	0
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	m4
diff -ruN m4.old/distinfo m4/distinfo
--- m4.old/distinfo	Sun Dec  3 20:22:20 2006
+++ m4/distinfo	Mon Apr  9 08:47:54 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (m4-1.4.8.tar.bz2) = 6bbf917e5d8fab20b38d43868c3944d3
-SHA256 (m4-1.4.8.tar.bz2) = d0e6734743f9eca530ea90c289c0f1770bdf37f846561557f0b0db7f87b7d7cc
-SIZE (m4-1.4.8.tar.bz2) = 580222
+MD5 (m4-1.4.9.tar.bz2) = bcfaf47194491a7a8b8d3c2811570b93
+SHA256 (m4-1.4.9.tar.bz2) = a8e29386374ba0eacbd7b339b97f169603d63a736bd87eee85ed2771ed7c3d29
+SIZE (m4-1.4.9.tar.bz2) = 609666
diff -ruN m4.old/files/patch-aa m4/files/patch-aa
--- m4.old/files/patch-aa	Sun Dec  3 20:22:21 2006
+++ m4/files/patch-aa	Wed Dec 31 19:00:00 1969
@@ -1,7 +0,0 @@
---- doc/Makefile.in.orig	Mon Nov 20 06:25:48 2006
-+++ doc/Makefile.in	Sun Dec  3 17:13:56 2006
-@@ -158,3 +158,3 @@
- M4_LTLIBOBJS = @M4_LTLIBOBJS@
--MAKEINFO = @MAKEINFO@
-+MAKEINFO = @MAKEINFO@ --no-split
- MKDIR_P = @MKDIR_P@
diff -ruN m4.old/files/patch-ab m4/files/patch-ab
--- m4.old/files/patch-ab	Sun Dec  3 20:22:21 2006
+++ m4/files/patch-ab	Wed Dec 31 19:00:00 1969
@@ -1,7 +0,0 @@
---- doc/m4.texinfo.orig	Mon Nov 20 05:55:43 2006
-+++ doc/m4.texinfo	Sun Dec  3 17:15:41 2006
-@@ -60,3 +60,3 @@
- @direntry
--* M4: (m4).                     A powerful macro processor.
-+* GM4: (m4).                     A powerful macro processor.
- @end direntry
diff -ruN m4.old/files/patch-doc-Makefile.in m4/files/patch-doc-Makefile.in
--- m4.old/files/patch-doc-Makefile.in	Wed Dec 31 19:00:00 1969
+++ m4/files/patch-doc-Makefile.in	Mon Apr  9 09:13:37 2007
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- doc/Makefile.in.orig	Mon Apr  9 07:18:52 2007
++++ doc/Makefile.in	Mon Apr  9 07:23:52 2007
+@@ -183,7 +183,7 @@
+ LTLIBOBJS = @LTLIBOBJS@
+ M4_LIBOBJS = @M4_LIBOBJS@
+ M4_LTLIBOBJS = @M4_LTLIBOBJS@
+-MAKEINFO = @MAKEINFO@
++MAKEINFO = @MAKEINFO@ --no-split
+ MKDIR_P = @MKDIR_P@
+ OBJEXT = @OBJEXT@
+ PACKAGE = @PACKAGE@
diff -ruN m4.old/files/patch-doc-m4.texinfo m4/files/patch-doc-m4.texinfo
--- m4.old/files/patch-doc-m4.texinfo	Wed Dec 31 19:00:00 1969
+++ m4/files/patch-doc-m4.texinfo	Mon Apr  9 09:14:10 2007
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- doc/m4.texinfo.orig	Mon Apr  9 07:19:22 2007
++++ doc/m4.texinfo	Mon Apr  9 07:19:54 2007
+@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@
+ 
+ @dircategory GNU programming tools
+ @direntry
+-* M4: (m4).                     A powerful macro processor.
++* GM4: (m4).                     A powerful macro processor.
+ @end direntry
+ 
+ @titlepage
diff -ruN m4.old/pkg-plist m4/pkg-plist
--- m4.old/pkg-plist	Sun Dec  3 20:22:20 2006
+++ m4/pkg-plist	Mon Apr  9 08:37:34 2007
@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
 bin/gm4
+lib/charset.alias
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/capitalize.m4
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/comments.m4
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/ddivert.m4

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
